---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new idea for this project
title: "Feature Request: [TITLE]"
labels: ["feature"]
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you would like to request.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? Please explain how it will be beneficial.

## Detailed Description

Provide a more detailed description of the feature, including any relevant drawings or screenshots.

## Additional Context

Any additional context, links, or resources that would be helpful.
